chart.searchString: sourcetype="hail" | eval intscale="SCALE"+tostring(floor(scale)) | chart count over year by intscale
chart.title: hail count v.s year

chart.searchString: sourcetype="hail" | eval intscale="SCALE"+tostring(floor(scale)) | chart count over month by intscale | sort by month
chart.title: hail count v.s month

chart.searchString: sourcetype="hail" | eval intscale="SCALE"+tostring(floor(scale)) | chart count over hour by intscale
chart.title: hail count v.s time

chart.searchString: sourcetype="hail" | stats count by state | sort by count desc | head 5
chart.title: the top 5 hail count state

table.searchString: sourcetype="hail" | stats count by state | sort by count desc | head 5 | join state [|search sourcetype="hail" | eval intscale="SCALE"+tostring(floor(scale)) | chart count over state by intscale] | fields - count
table.title: the top 5 hail count state v.s hail scale

chart.searchString: sourcetype="hail" | eval intscale="SCALE"+tostring(floor(scale)) | chart avg(injuries) over hour by intscale
chart.title: the scale of hail v.s average injuries(by hour)

chart.searchString: sourcetype="hail" | eval intscale="SCALE"+tostring(floor(scale)) | chart avg(fatalities) over hour by intscale
chart.title: the scale of hail v.s average fatalities(by hour)
